parsed_output.justification: Jessica claims she was the Minion and saw no Werewolves. Kaelan claims he was the Robber and robbed Jessica, which would make him the Minion, but Kevin (the Troublemaker) then swapped Kaelan and Jessica, potentially returning the Minion role to Jessica. Since the Minion saw no Werewolves and the players (Kevin, Daniel, and Jessica) all agree to vote for the center, it is highly likely that no Werewolf is present among the players.
